description:
Matt Pocock open-sourced the .claude folder he uses every day. 68,842 stars in 90 days, more than Next.js earned in three years.

This video walks the actual repo: four flagship skills (/grill-me, /tdd, /diagnose, the CONTEXT.md verbosity fix), how each kills a specific failure mode of AI coding agents, and why a folder of Markdown is currently outpacing Spec-Kit, BMAD, and GSD on stars. Plus the one-line installer that explains the velocity. Steal his version — install command on screen.

TIMESTAMPS
0:00 - Hook: 68K stars in 90 days
0:19 - Inside the folder
0:44 - Why "vibe coding" is the enemy
1:00 - /grill-me — interview yourself
1:31 - CONTEXT.md — kill the verbosity
1:59 - /tdd — vertical slices, tracer bullets
2:31 - /diagnose — build a feedback loop
3:01 - vs Spec-Kit, BMAD, GSD
3:31 - Why smallness wins
3:55 - The skills.sh installer
4:13 - Verdict + install command
4:25 - Outro

LINKS & RESOURCES
- Matt Pocock's skills repo: https://github.com/mattpocock/skills
- /grill-me skill: https://github.com/mattpocock/skills/blob/main/skills/productivity/grill-me/SKILL.md
- /tdd skill: https://github.com/mattpocock/skills/blob/main/skills/engineering/tdd/SKILL.md
- /diagnose skill: https://github.com/mattpocock/skills/blob/main/skills/engineering/diagnose/SKILL.md
- BMAD-METHOD: https://github.com/bmad-code-org/BMAD-METHOD
- Framework comparison roundup (MarkTechPost, May 2026): https://www.marktechpost.com/2026/05/08/9-best-ai-tools-for-spec-driven-development-in-2026-kiro-bmad-gsd-and-more-compare/
- 30+ agentic coding frameworks map: https://medium.com/@visrow/spec-driven-development-is-eating-software-engineering-a-map-of-30-agentic-coding-frameworks-6ac0b5e2b484
- Pocock's skills newsletter: https://www.aihero.dev/s/skills-newsletter
- Install in one line: `npx skills@latest add mattpocock/skills`

TAGS
#ClaudeCode #AgentSkills #VibeCoding #MattPocock #DevTools
fulltitle: He Open-Sourced His Claude Folder. 68K Stars on github
